items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month, underperforming the Zacks Chemical - Diversified industry and the S&P 500's declines of 6.7% and 0.1%, respectively. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the ALB stock lately.

items.headline: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $205 From $264
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $211.44, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Despite strong fundamental momentum, the stock has recently experienced short-term technical weakness, pulling back to the $140 range, while analysts' average price target is $214.65. The company's shares are trading for less than 12 times forward earnings.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. RBC stated it now expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8 billio

items.headline: Albemarle's EBITDA to Benefit From Higher Lithium Prices, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle's (ALB) EBITDA will likely benefit from stronger lithium prices in the range of low to mid-$20s per kilogram, RBC Capital Markets analysts said. Analysts retained an outperform rating on the stock and increased its price target to $253 from $245.

items.headline: Research Alert: Albemarle Corporation Posts Strong Q1 Beat On Lithium Recovery
items.snippet: CFRA, an independent research provider, has provided MT Newswires with the following research alert. Albemarle delivered strong Q1 results with net sales of $1.43B (+33% Y/Y, 8.4% above consensus) and adjusted EPS of $2.95 vs. a loss of $0.18 in the prior year, beating consensus
